summary: Tightened qd report validation so roadmap finding records must reference known nodes and use the accepted finding severity and status vocabularies.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects findings[] entries whose node_id is blank, missing, or does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates findings[].node_id values as non-blank strings in the roadmap node id set; evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-node-id.log and evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/negative-smoke-blank-node-id.log record the expected rejections.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown findings[].severity values outside P0, P1, P2, P3.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates findings[].severity against P0, P1, P2, and P3; evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-severity.log records severity=P4 failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown findings[].status values outside open, resolved, promoted.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates findings[].status against open, resolved, and promoted; evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-status.log records status=deferred failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Current reports/export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with this node's reports included.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Record evidence under evidence/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract including just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check if available, negative smokes, and git diff --check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, four temporary-copy negative smoke logs, and git-diff-check.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Add reports/qd/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/completion.json and audit.json with nodeId matching the directory and commits[] empty until after merge unless qd tooling requires otherwise.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/completion.json and reports/qd/m4-qd-finding-schema-contract/audit.json both use nodeId=m4-qd-finding-schema-contract; completion commits[] is empty.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, or latency behavior is claimed.
